headline: Jim Cramer on Paychex: “This Is a Stock That Strangely Has Been Crushed By AI Disruption Worries, I Think They’re Overblown”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. Cramer commented on the company’s latest quarterly results, as he said: This morning, we got a strong quarter from Paychex, one of the largest payroll processors in America, with a big outsourced human resources […]

headline: Paychex Weighs AI Gains And Paycor Synergies With New US$1b Buyback
summary: Paychex (NasdaqGS:PAYX) has completed the integration of Paycor, aligning the acquired platform with its core human capital management services. The company now reports more than 500 AI-powered capabilities embedded across its operations and product suite. Management has approved a new US$1b stock repurchase authorization, which signals confidence in the business. Paychex, a major provider of payroll, HR, and benefits solutions for small and mid-sized businesses, is reshaping its profile...
